title: lappula texana var. columbiana
intro: Lappula texana var. columbiana, also known as Columbian prickly poppy, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lappula texana var. columbiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
